monday.description: Pan-seared Free-range Beef Chuck with sautéed Dried Reishi Mushrooms, served with Gluten-free Egg Noodles and a hint of Crema Catalana Base.

tuesday.description: Smoked Weisswurst charcuterie grilled and served with Bhatura bread, roasted Pumpkin, and a side of Skyr yogurt.

wednesday.description: Slow-cooked Organic Chicken Gizzards with Whole Wheat Sandwich Bread, Organic Mung Bean Sprouts, and a hint of Bay Rum Berries.

thursday.description: Pan-seared Free-range Duck Liver served with Schuttelbrot bread, sautéed Trumpet Mushrooms, and a drizzle of Reduced-sodium Chinkiang Vinegar.

friday.description: Pan-seared Organic Turkey Liver tossed with Gluten-free Glass Noodles, Dulse Flakes, and a dollop of Full-fat Blueberry Yogurt.

monday.description: Sliced Lancashire cheese baked with Anelletti pasta, Zucchini, and a sprinkle of Cumin.

tuesday.description: Wheat Seitan plant protein stir-fried with Organic Sticky Rice, Organic Globe Artichokes, and a drizzle of Reduced-sodium Barbecue Sauce.

wednesday.description: Sliced Aged Cheddar cheese served with Breadsticks, steamed Green Beans, and a sprinkle of Ground Dried Pasilla Chiles.

thursday.description: Grated Wensleydale cheese mixed with Whole Grain Hulled Barley, roasted Organic Yellow Bell Peppers, and a sprinkle of Ground Berbere Spice Mix.

friday.description: Grated White Cheddar cheese tossed with Pici pasta, sautéed Oyster Mushrooms, and a side of Vietnamese Pickled Vegetables.
